agentRuns.label: Agent 1
agentRuns.reportSummary: Exploration was repeatedly derailed by interstitials and unresponsive navigation. The first homepage click triggered a Google vignette overlay, several obvious links did nothing or timed out, and a Cloudflare “Just a moment…” wall blocked further browsing when switching Basketball to Tomorrow. While some pages did load (Today 1X2, Basketball Today) with matching titles, the overall experience felt unpredictable and fragile.

agentRuns.label: Agent 2
agentRuns.reportSummary: The agent completed 0 of 1 tasks, partially completed 1, and failed 0.   The automated accessibility pass found 12 issues, including 7 higher-impact items. The final report was synthesized directly from recorded evidence because the model-based review step could not finish cleanly within the remaining run budget.

agentRuns.label: Agent 3
agentRuns.reportSummary: Core prediction pages opened and were labeled clearly, but navigation was repeatedly disrupted by an interstitial (google_vignette) and slow page transitions. Several clicks showed no visible change or timed out, eroding confidence. Heavy ad tech presence and numerous accessibility violations further undermine trust for a first‑time skeptic. Overall usable, but marred by ads, friction, and basic a11y gaps.

agentRuns.label: Agent 4
agentRuns.reportSummary: Parts of the site are understandable (Today/Tomorrow predictions with matching page titles), but navigation is inconsistent and often stalls. Multiple obvious clicks did nothing or timed out, a vignette/ad anchor appeared to hijack the URL state, and a Cloudflare interstitial blocked a core tab switch. Heavy ad/analytics noise and two accessibility violations further erode confidence. This was not a smooth first‑visit experience.

agentRuns.label: Agent 5
agentRuns.reportSummary: Clear labels exist (e.g., Tennis, Predictions for TODAY/TOMORROW), but progress was repeatedly blocked by an ad vignette and a Cloudflare “Just a moment…” interstitial. Several clicks produced no visible change or timed out, and the key match-detail path hit a security wall. Because the run was blocked by verification checks, findings on deeper content are limited and partially inconclusive.

reportSummary: 5 of 5 agent perspectives completed for https://forebet.com/. The average overall score was 4/10.
